{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Estrala
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Estrala]] is a heavily industrialized world specializing in exotic mining.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c49">''The Engineer'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
